english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: لا حَوْلَ وَلا قُوَّةَ إلاَّ بِاللّهِ
english translation text:
There is no power or strength except by Allah
[x7]

There is no strength except by Allah
[x10]

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
